name: clockify-ts-sdk-workspace
description: npm workspaces root for clockify-sdk-ts-115 (SDK), @clockify115/cli, and @clockify115/mcp-server. Not published.

scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm run type-check -w @clockify115/cli && npm run type-check -w @clockify115/mcp-server
scripts.build: npm run build -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm run build -w @clockify115/cli && npm run build -w @clockify115/mcp-server
scripts.test: npm test -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm test -w @clockify115/cli && npm test -w @clockify115/mcp-server
